user_system_path: Controller/autopilot must generate one valid app-owner contract from current product truth when backlog rows are waiting-only, instead of stopping at UNKNOWN.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/**`, `components/**`, `lib/briefing/**`, `lib/cron/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths`
required_local_proof: node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run controller:autopilot; npm run health; npm run build
acceptance_condition: When backlog rows are all waiting, blocked, or closed, controller/autopilot emits one valid app-owner contract with a real money_loop_rung and exact proof/stop fields, or stops only on an exact external blocker.
stop_condition: Do not call this done from backlog emptiness, logs alone, or a code diff without focused controller proof. If Codex cannot prove that at least one production rung advanced, the run did not count.
anti_regression_checks: Controller never emits UNKNOWN as the normal waiting-only stop state.
External blockers still stop honestly with one exact blocker reason.
next_command: Repair controller/autopilot contract generation only. Allowed: scripts/controller-autopilot.ts | scripts/preflight-contract.ts | scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts | ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md | SESSION_HISTORY.md. Proof: local="node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run controller:autopilot; npm run health; npm run build" production="npm run controller:autopilot". Stop when: Do not call this done from backlog emptiness, logs alone, or a code diff without focused controller proof. If Codex cannot prove that at least one production rung advanced, the run did not count.
